[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a small, low-resolution block of stylized, non-Latin text arranged in multiple lines on a white background.  

Main Subject:  
The main focus is the stacked text, made up of thick, dark characters with diacritic-like marks, aligned mostly in separate lines and separated by spacing.  

Setting:  
The background is plain white, with no other visible objects or environment. The lighting and time of day are not applicable because there is no scene content beyond the text.  

Visual Details:  
The text is black or very dark gray with visible pixelation, irregular stroke thickness, and small marks above or near some characters. The composition is centered toward the left-middle of the frame, with several lines of text and a few horizontal separators implied by spacing between lines. The overall image has a cropped, zoomed-in look.  

Visible Text:  
No important visible text detected.  

Practical Summary:  
This image displays a zoomed-in view of stacked stylized text on a white background. No other content besides the text is clearly visible.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

# Notes

The screenshot text is very low-resolution/blurred and appears rotated and/or corrupted. Some characters are not confidently legible, so I marked one line as `[unclear]` and the other lines may contain OCR errors. If you upload a higher-resolution or less-compressed image (or rotate it upright), I can re-extract accurately.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image contains Arabic calligraphy. The text appears to be a religious phrase, possibly from the Quran or a Hadith, as it includes words like "Alhamdulillah" (Praise be to God) and "Jazakallahu Khairan" (May Allah reward you with goodness). There is no nudity, pornographic, or suggestive content present in the image.
